description_long: This object consists of a set of three wooden stools, each with a round seat and three slender, tapered legs. The seats feature a scalloped or wavy edge, adding a decorative touch to the otherwise simple design. The stools are made from wood in varying shades, ranging from light to dark brown, suggesting either different wood types or finishes. The legs are straight and evenly spaced, providing stability, and each stool is of similar height and proportion. The surface of the seats appears smooth with a matte finish, and there are no visible backrests or footrests. These stools are suitable for use in public or urban settings such as parks, cafes, or waiting areas.
description: A set of three round wooden stools with scalloped edges and slender, tapered legs in varying wood tones. The design is simple yet decorative, with smooth, matte surfaces and no backrests or footrests.
description_view_0: Three stools are shown side by side, highlighting the scalloped seat edges and the variation in wood tones from left to right.
description_view_1: The stools are viewed at an angle, emphasizing the depth and staggered arrangement, with the scalloped edges and leg details visible.
description_view_2: The stools are aligned in a row, clearly showing the round seats, scalloped edges, and the differences in wood color.
description_view_3: The stools are viewed from the opposite angle, with the darker stool in the foreground and the lighter ones behind, showcasing the seat shapes and leg arrangement.
